name: Algorithmic Breakthrough
text1: A major lab discovered how to train frontier models with a fraction of the usual hardware. The technique was demonstrated internally.
text2: A major lab discovered how to train frontier models with far less hardware. Similar techniques were independently reproduced using leaked research.
image-prompt: A scientific paper on a desk with mathematical equations glowing bright red, casting alarming light across a researcher's worried face, dramatic lighting, digital painting, no text
